title: immersive ores dimensions addon
description: An addon for immersive ores that add 2 new dimension, the ori, which includes new features like tungsten ores and furno, which include cristals and a new type of wood
body:
This addon is for the immersive ores mod, it adds 2 new dimensions, 2 new ores, and more !

The ornium dimension is a dimension based on the overworld, accessible with a new block in every dimension, that is crafted with some gold and netherite.
In the ornium dimension, there are other type of grass blocks, dirt block and stone blocks, which are orange. They reduce the player speed by 60%, and also the jump height by the same value.
In this dimension, you can find some ores that are also in the overworld like cooper, iron or diamonds, you can find types of stone that are in the overworld like andesite or tuff, and you can find a new ore, the tungsten, which can be used to craft very powerful tools.
You can also find a structure, the ornium temple, which as the tungsten heart, a kind of trophy, in its center.
Furno dimension is a dimension that is also based on the overworld, accessible with a new block in every dimension, that is crafted with tungsten, a tungsten heart, and blaze rods.
In furno dimension, there are other type of grass blocks, dirt block and stone blocks, which are orange and purple. They reduce the player speed by 60%, and also the jump height by the same value.
In this dimension, you can find some ores that are also in the overworld like cooper, iron or diamonds, you can find types of stone that are in the overworld like andesite or tuff, and you can find a new ore, the furno cristal, which can be used to craft very very powerful tools.
You can also find trees of jacaranda.

This mod requires the immersive ores mod.
